items.title: Where is UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Headed According to Wall Street?
items.description: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) is one of the most widely held stocks by hedge funds in 2025. Reuters reported on December 19 that UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) announced on Friday that audits of its health services and pharmacy benefit units conducted by outside consulting firms would lead to operational changes, including increased automation and standardization of […]

items.title: Morgan Stanley asks: Is UNH "the CVS of 2026"?
items.description: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley is asking whether Unitedhealth Group (NYSE:UNH) could become “the CVS of 2026,” arguing that recent actions suggest a clear intention toward margin repair even at the expense of membership growth.

items.title: My S&P 500 Prediction On Sector Outperformers And Laggards In 2026
items.description: The S&P 500 sector ETFs delivered strong gains in 2025, led by XLK, XLC, and XLI. Click here to read more about the sectors.
